content: A Hybrid Planning and Learning System can be augmented by tiered gating of ICM curiosity signals tied to long-term active learning agent memory, where only high-surprise, goal-aligned curious exploration is retained for hierarchical planning rather than discarding low-value exploratory trajectories. This creates a self-tuning system that balances structured long-horizon planning with open-ended curious exploration, avoiding the common pitfalls of pure curiosity-driven wandering or rigid inflexible planning.
